calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jan-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andy Peri appeared by zoom in Propria Person.

The Court stated that it reviewed the petition, that it looks like the census in San Francisco places the family here in 1900, in Marin in 1910 and that the birth was in 1903. The Court also questions if any efforts were made to see if the Grandfather was born in Marin and asked what the story is as to why the family came here. Mr. Peri stated that he did not search for records in Marin, that he does not know what the story is as to why they came here and that he can probably hunt down some of the story as some of the relatives are still living. The Court stated that it thinks it is pretty clear that Charles was born in California, that Mr. Peri has provided enough information and that it is prepared to take the matter under submission with the intent to sign the order. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: S. Park. Not reported.
